description_long: This is a structured, medium-sized handbag crafted from pebbled leather in a light beige or off-white color. It features two sturdy, rounded top handles and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap attached with gold-tone hardware. The bag's body is rectangular with a flat base, and the sides are reinforced with visible stitching and a central zipper running vertically. The front and back panels are minimally adorned, with the back displaying a small, circular metallic logo emblem. Decorative gold rivets and hardware accents add a touch of elegance, while the overall design is clean and modern. The interior is likely spacious, suitable for carrying personal items in an urban setting.
description: A structured, light beige pebbled leather handbag with gold hardware, dual top handles, and a detachable shoulder strap. Minimalist design with a small metallic logo and visible stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clean, unadorned panel with dual top handles, gold hardware, and the attached shoulder strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, vertical zipper, reinforced stitching, and the attachment points for the handles and strap.
description_view_2: Back view featuring a small circular metallic logo emblem, dual handles, and the shoulder strap, mirroring the front's minimalist style.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical zipper, stitching details, and gold hardware, similar to the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: Small, circular metallic emblem on the upper right of the back panel, featuring a simple geometric design.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded top handles and one long, detachable, adjustable shoulder strap attached with gold-tone clasps.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Central zipper closure running vertically along the top and sides of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold-tone hardware, small metallic logo emblem, and decorative rivets near the handle bases.
